name: Project Management
description: Manages the set of active projects: metadata, per-project rules and instructions, display descriptions, color assignments, crash/log paths, and game-project detection. Acts as the primary source of project configuration consumed by tasks and prompts.

Models/ProjectEntry.cs.content:
enum McpStatus
    Disabled, NotConnected, Connecting, Connected, Failed, Initialized, Investigating
class ProjectEntry
  Name: string
  Path: string
  McpStatus: McpStatus
  McpServerName: string
  McpAddress: string
  McpStartCommand: string
  ShortDescription: string
  LongDescription: string
  RuleInstruction: string
  ProjectRules: List<string>
  Color: string
  IsGame: bool
  CrashLogPath: string
  AppLogPath: string
  HangLogPath: string
  AutoRegenerateClaudeMd: bool
  IsInitializing: bool
  McpProcessId: int
  McpActiveInstance: string
  McpUnityPid: int

patterns: Facade over sub-managers (Colors, Descriptions, Rules, Mcp)
Per-project color persistence with random backfill
dependencies: Saves/loads project list via JSON persistence
